scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=@eventhub/shell" "npm run dev --workspace=@eventhub/events" "npm run dev --workspace=@eventhub/host-dashboard"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/shell/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/events/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/host-dashboard/tsconfig.json
